biteOfDay: Table Rock walleye are on fire — 40+ fish days on gravel points. Taneycomo trout are biting early before generation kicks in; pink worm and nightcrawlers are the top producers.

taneycomo.generation: Minimal until ~8 AM, then ramping to ~12,800 cfs by late morning through evening. Morning low-water window is prime for wading.

species.name: Largemouth / Spotted Bass
species.technique: Topwater at dawn, deep crankbaits, football jigs, jighead minnow

species.name: Walleye
species.technique: Crankbaits, live bait — hottest bite on the lake right now

species.name: Crappie
species.technique: Brush piles/timber in creek arms, live minnows, tube jigs

species.name: Bluegill
species.technique: Worms, small poppers — fantastic for kids

species.name: Trout (Taneycomo)
species.technique: Fly: Provo Rig (scud + egg). Spin: Pink worm under float, nightcrawlers

tip: Fish early mornings. Table Rock topwater at sunrise. Taneycomo no-generation window before 8 AM is prime for wading fly fishing. When generation kicks on, switch to drifting — trout turn on when water moves.
